message:
fix(db): correct sqlite:// URI path parsing to preserve absolute paths

sqlite_file_path_from_database_url incorrectly treated sqlite:///path
as relative by stripping the leading slash. Paths like
sqlite:///home/ubuntu/db.sqlite3 resolved to home/ubuntu/db.sqlite3,
missing the root. Now only explicit ./ and ../ prefixes trigger the
relative-path stripping, matching standard SQLite URI semantics.

Re-export sqlmodel_sqlite from mcp-agent-mail-db for downstream use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
